description_long: This snowman is constructed from three large, roughly spherical snowballs stacked vertically, each decreasing in size from bottom to top. Its face features two coal-like eyes, a carrot-shaped nose, and a mouth made from small, round stones arranged in a smile. The snowman is adorned with a classic black top hat with a red band, adding a festive touch. Its arms are made from simple, branched sticks protruding from either side of the middle snowball. Three additional stone buttons run down the front of its torso. The surface of the snowman is slightly uneven, mimicking the natural texture of packed snow.
description: A three-tiered snowman with a black top hat, stick arms, coal facial features, and stone buttons, all set on a textured snowy body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face, carrot nose, coal eyes, stick mouth, stone buttons, and both stick arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose, one stick arm, and the profile of the top hat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the snowman's snowballs, top hat, and both stick arms with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carrot nose in profile, one stick arm, and the side of the top hat.
